name: Create config module with settings
description: Create Settings class using pydantic-settings for database URL, JWT secret, bcrypt cost, rate limit config. Implement get_settings dependency injection function.
done_criteria: Database URL and JWT secret are configurable

name: Create email validator utility
description: Create EmailValidator class with validate method that checks email format. Raise ValidationError for invalid emails.

name: Create domain models and schemas
description: Create SQLAlchemy User model with id, email, hashed_password, created_at. Create Pydantic schemas: UserCreate, UserLogin, UserResponse, TokenPayload, TokenPair, RefreshRequest.

name: Create custom exception hierarchy
description: Create AuthException base class with status_code and detail. Implement AuthenticationError, InvalidCredentialsError, InvalidTokenError, ExpiredTokenError, DuplicateEmailError, RateLimitExceededError, ValidationException.
done_criteria: All exceptions have correct HTTP status codes

name: Create user repository interface and implementation
description: Create UserRepository Protocol with methods: create, get_by_id, get_by_email, exists_by_email. Create UserRepositoryImpl using SQLAlchemy with database connection pool from config.

name: Create password hashing service
description: Create PasswordService with hash_password and verify_password methods using bcrypt with cost 12. Performance target under 50ms.
done_criteria: verify_password returns True for correct password
verify_password returns False for incorrect password

name: Create JWT token service
description: Create TokenService with create_access_token, create_refresh_token, validate_token, decode_token using HS256 algorithm. Access token expires in 24 hours, refresh in 7 days.
done_criteria: Access token contains user_id and email claims

name: Create user service with registration logic
description: Create UserService with register_user, get_user_by_id, get_user_by_email. Register validates email, checks duplicates, hashes password, persists user. Raises DuplicateEmailError on conflict.
done_criteria: register_user raises DuplicateEmailError for existing email

name: Create auth service facade
description: Create AuthService orchestrating register, login, refresh_token, validate_token. Register and login generate token pairs. Login verifies password. refresh_token validates refresh token and generates new pair.
done_criteria: login raises InvalidCredentialsError on wrong password

name: Create rate limiter middleware
description: Create RateLimitMiddleware for IP-based rate limiting with 10 requests per 60 second window. Implement in-memory storage with interface for Redis swap. Raise RateLimitExceededError when exceeded.
done_criteria: Middleware blocks after 10 requests in 60 seconds

name: Create JWT auth middleware
description: Create JWTAuthMiddleware extracting JWT from Authorization header. Create get_current_user dependency that validates token and injects user. Raise InvalidTokenError or ExpiredTokenError.

name: Create FastAPI dependency injection
description: Create get_auth_service and get_user_repository FastAPI dependencies for dependency injection.

name: Create API routes for authentication
description: Create APIRouter with POST /auth/register, POST /auth/login, POST /auth/refresh, GET /auth/me endpoints. Register returns UserResponse with 201. Login returns TokenPair. Refresh returns new TokenPair. /me requires auth.
done_criteria: GET /me returns UserResponse with auth required

name: Create test fixtures configuration
description: Create shared pytest fixtures including test database session, mock settings, test user data, sample tokens for testing all components.
